message:
test: pin socket send/recv conformance via differential harness

Adds tests/conformance_diff_socket_send_recv.rs covering 4 functions:
- send / recv: cross fl-send + lc-recv and inverse round-trip
- recv MSG_DONTWAIT on empty socket: both fail with EAGAIN
- send / recv with bad fd: both fail consistently
- sendmsg / recvmsg: 3-iovec gather + 2-iovec scatter, verifies
  concatenated payload matches across impls

5 tests pass, 0 divergences against glibc. Complements the existing
sys_socket harness (creation/binding) with the actual data-transfer
paths.

Bead: bd-srcv1
